user.title: Vanlife Tracker Setup
user.description: Configure GPS tracking and auto-stop detection for your van.

data_description.gps_entity: A device_tracker or sensor with latitude/longitude attributes (e.g. Starlink GPS).
data_description.vehicle_moving_entity: Binary sensor that indicates when the vehicle is in motion (optional).
data_description.weather_entity: Weather entity to capture conditions at each stop (optional).
data_description.stop_delay_minutes: How long the van must be stopped before an auto-stop is created.
data_description.geocoding_enabled: Use OpenStreetMap Nominatim to auto-name stops by nearest town.

traccar.title: Traccar Route Tracking (Optional)
traccar.description: Enable route tracking via a Traccar server. Install the Traccar add-on first if you want this.

data_description.traccar_enabled: Push GPS positions to Traccar while the van is moving.
data_description.traccar_url: URL of your Traccar server (e.g. http://localhost:8082).
data_description.gps_publish_interval: How often to send GPS updates to Traccar while moving.

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Please select a valid entity.
error.no_gps_attributes: Selected entity does not have latitude/longitude attributes.
error.invalid_url: Invalid URL. Must start with http:// or https://.

create_stop.name: Create Stop
create_stop.description: Create a new campsite/stop at the current location (or specified coordinates).

update_stop.name: Update Stop
update_stop.description: Update an existing stop's name, notes, rating, or category.

delete_stop.name: Delete Stop
delete_stop.description: Delete a stop by its ID.

depart_current_stop.name: Depart Current Stop
depart_current_stop.description: Mark the current stop as departed (sets departure time to now).

get_stops.name: Get Stops
get_stops.description: Retrieve recent stops. Results are fired as a vanlife_tracker_stops_response event.

export_gpx.name: Export GPX
export_gpx.description: Export all stops as a GPX file to /config/www/vanlife_stops.gpx.

create_named_place.name: Create Named Place
create_named_place.description: Create a named place so future stops at this location are automatically labeled.

delete_named_place.name: Delete Named Place
delete_named_place.description: Delete a named place by its ID.

get_named_places.name: Get Named Places
get_named_places.description: Retrieve all named places. Results are fired as a vanlife_tracker_named_places_response event.

backfill_stops.name: Backfill Stops from History
backfill_stops.description: Analyze historical GPS data and automatically create stop records for stationary periods.

backfill_trips.name: Backfill Trips from GPS Track
backfill_trips.description: Process GPS track data into computed trips and auto-detected stops.
